theorem P2_implies_P1_and_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P1 A ∧ P3 A :=
by
  intro hP2
  have hP2' : A ⊆ interior (closure (interior A)) := by
    simpa [P2] using hP2
  -- Proof of P1
  have hP1 : P1 A := by
    dsimp [P1]
    intro x hx
    have hxint : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2' hx
    exact (Set.interior_subset) hxint
  -- Proof of P3
  have hP3 : P3 A := by
    dsimp [P3]
    intro x hx
    have hxint : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2' hx
    have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
      have hsub : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A :=
        Set.closure_mono (Set.interior_subset)
      exact Set.interior_mono hsub
    exact hsubset hxint
  exact And.intro hP1 hP3

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [P2] at hP2
  dsimp [P1]
  exact subset_trans hP2 interior_subset
